ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the subject is participating in */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the subject */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject was enrolled in the experiment */,
  "dropout_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject dropped out of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the session was conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the trial was conducted */,
  "imagename" TEXT /* Name of the image used in the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the trial started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the trial ended */,
  "trial_duration" REAL /* Duration of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image used in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_imagename FOREIGN KEY ("imagename") REFERENCES images ("imagename"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject who made the response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the subject to make the response */,
  "object_response" TEXT /* Object the subject responded with */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the subject's response */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the subject's response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "imagename" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object depicted in the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "image_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure the integrity of the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)
column_names: Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment
ID of the experiment the subject is participating in
Highest level of education completed by the subject
Date when the subject was enrolled in the experiment
Date when the subject dropped out of the experiment
ID of the experiment the session belongs to

Name of the image used in the trial
ID of the image used in the trial
